name: Lakeville Links Indoor Golf
address: 17630 Juniper Path Suite H, Lakeville, MN 55044
about: Lakeville Links Premier Indoor Golf operates two locations in Minnesota, featuring Golfzon NX simulators. The Lakeville venue has 6 simulators with a full bar and menu, while the Stillwater location has 4 sims with food and drink service provided by Stillwater Bowl. The venues offer flexible memberships, leagues, contests, and group event hosting. The Golfzon NX system utilizes high-speed camera sensors, a moving swing plate, and an auto-tee retrieval system.
why_golfers_like_it: Golfzon NX simulators with advanced technology
Flexible membership hours that never expire
Full bar and food options available
Multiple simulator locations in the Twin Cities area

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available at Lakeville location; food provided by Stillwater Bowl at the Stillwater location
Full bar available with ice cold draft beer, selzters, and Bloody Marys

simulator_hardware.notes: 6 units at Lakeville location, 4 units at Stillwater location

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as both locations offer full bars and menus.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Use one hour per person for 18 holes as a guide. Each simulator can accommodate up to 6 players, but 4 players per simulator is recommended for the best pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for junior golfers and youth programs.
